title: Man to be charged after driving Porsche with children on car boot
description: The incident, filmed and shared online, showed two young boys clinging to the rear of a moving Porsche along Dairy Farm Lane near Bukit Panjang.

title: Kurukshetra rally to oppose India–US trade deal today: Haryana BKU chief
description: The union leader also said that US-India trade agreement will not only affect agriculture but will have a deep impact on the overall economy of the country.

title: EU court adviser casts doubt on Ireland’s nitrates derogation in water quality case
description: High Court has sought EU opinion on Government’s duty regarding protections from farm pollution

title: Blueberry industry under scrutiny amid rapid growth
description: Australians are eating and growing more blueberries than ever before, but questions are being asked about how production of the fruit is being regulated.
